creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Volodymyr,

Volodymyr Kostyrko, 12.05.13, 21:58h CEST:

> This is BSD make error, when I add USE_GMAKE=yes to the port Makefile the
> port compiles fine for me and even works.

I didn't look at the generated Makefile. It's interesting that it works
with me (and the redports.org tinderbox) without USE_GMAKE=yes. However, I
have added it to the Makefile in the tree now. Thanks for the feedback!

Best regards,
Stefan
